Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/SBDC_News.asp

# SBDC News and Calendar Resource

## Resource type
News, top stories, event calendar, and communications contact page.

## Best for
Users looking for current SBDC news, top stories, upcoming calendar items, and event links.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stages
All stages.

## Use when the entrepreneur says
"What’s new?" "What events are coming up?" "Where is the SBDC calendar?"

## Resource summary
The news page includes top stories, news and events, recorded webinars, calendar items, and communications contact information.

## What the user can do with this resource
Use for current news and calendar routing; verify event dates live.

## BOSS routing notes
Do not hard-code class dates in BOSS unless checked during the current session.

## Related source URLs
- https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/In-Person_Events.asp
- https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/webinars.asp

## BOSS Library use notes
- Treat this as a resource-routing document, not as legal, tax, lending, certification, or procurement advice.
- Use the linked source URL as the user-facing official link.
- Ask discovery questions before routing when the user is early-stage or unclear.
- For Houston/77084 users, verify county/service-area fit through the official SBDC/SBA locator before giving a final local-office referral.
